description.content: Operations for audio transcription and translation
Transcribes audio into the input language using the Whisper model.

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

variable.description: (Required) The deployment ID of the model to use for this request.
The Azure OpenAI resource endpoint. Format: https://{resource-name}.openai.azure.com

formdata.description: (Required) The audio file object to transcribe, in one of these formats: flac, mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, ogg, wav, or webm.
The language of the input audio. Supplying the input language in ISO-639-1 format will improve accuracy and latency.
An optional text to guide the model's style or continue a previous audio segment.
The format of the transcript output. (This can only be one of json,text,srt,verbose_json,vtt)

variable.description: (Required) The deployment ID of the model to use for this request.
The Azure OpenAI resource endpoint. Format: https://{resource-name}.openai.azure.com

info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure OpenAI Service API

description.content:
Azure OpenAI Service provides REST API access to OpenAI's language models including GPT-4, GPT-4 Turbo, GPT-3.5-Turbo, and the Embeddings model series. These models can be adapted to tasks including content generation, summarization, semantic search, and natural language to code translation. Users access the service through REST APIs, Python SDK, or the web-based interface in the Azure AI Foundry portal.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure Support
 Email: azuresupport@microsoft.com
